calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Set For Case Management Conference On Apr-12-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant John Villanueva's motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that complies with CRC 437c(g).

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication As To Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Defendant Amedisys, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order that complies with CRC 437c(g).

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-09-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ARLO URIARTE, ESQ. of Liberation Law Group, P.C., Tel No. 415-695-1000 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. LONNIE D. GIAMELA, ESQ. of Fisher & Phillips LLP, Tel No. 213-330-4500 appearing telephonically for Defendants John Villanueva and Amedisys, Inc.

Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. As to DEFENDANTS JOHN VILLANUEVA AND AMEDISYS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, Defendants' demurrer to all three causes of action is overruled with twenty days to answer. All three claims are adequately pled. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-03-2016 Continued To Feb-10-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LONNIE D. GIAMELA, ESQ. of Fisher & Phillips LLP, Tel No. 213-330-4500 appearing telephonically for Defendants Amedisys;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Defense counsel represents to the Court that a flight delay prevented him from timely accessing and contesting the Court's tentative ruling. The Court allows the hearing on DEFENDANTS JOHN VILLANUEVA AND AMEDISYS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT to be continued to permit the opposing side to appear. The Court instructs defense counsel to confer with opposing counsel and inform the Court of an agreed upon hearing date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

-----

After hearing, counsel inform the Court via e-mail that parties have agreed to continue the hearing on DEFENDANTS JOHN VILLANUEVA AND AMEDISYS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
to 2/10/16 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. (302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
